title: Katechon Technology
description: Katechon Technology pitch cut for Dune Ventures.

visuals.prompt: Cinematic 16:9 dashboard header for the Katechon Technology fundraise deck: live software channels arranged like a premium media control room, luminous application surfaces, avatar narration energy suggested through abstract signal waves, dark full-bleed investor demo aesthetic, refined red ember and emerald signal accents, no readable text, no logos, no watermark

slides.headline: Software is becoming content.
slides.line: AI makes applications cheap enough to generate in real time.
slides.narration: Instagram captured the camera-in-every-pocket moment. TikTok captured algorithmic video. Now AI is making software cheap enough to generate in real time.
slides.visualPrompt: Wide cinematic background for the inflection where software becomes content. A luminous semi-abstract field of generated application surfaces emerging like media cards from a bright model core, airy futuristic sci-fi composition, deep space with blue-black depth but not heavy or muddy, refined emerald, red ember, amber, and blue signal accents, premium interactive media aesthetic, crisp glass interface fragments. Keep the left third quiet and dark for overlay copy, with no marks in that area. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no UI labels, no typography, no logos, no watermark, no people

slides.headline: Live software channels.
slides.line: Always-on surfaces people can watch, scroll, and eventually act inside.
slides.narration: Katechon turns that new abundance into channels: live dashboards with the state of a game, the voice of a streamer, and the motion of a feed.
slides.visualPrompt: Wide cinematic background for live software channels. Semi-abstract futuristic media surface, floating channel panes, game-like state arcs, narrator energy represented as a clean luminous voice waveform, feels like interactive media rather than enterprise dashboard SaaS. Spacious, elegant, high-contrast, not cluttered, not a dark cockpit, not heavy. Blue-black sci-fi depth with emerald, red ember, amber, and soft cyan accents. Keep the left third quiet and dark for overlay copy, with no marks in that area. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no UI labels, no typography, no logos, no watermark, no people

slides.headline: Stream the object, not the recording.
slides.narration: Video flattens software into pixels. Katechon keeps the underlying object live, structured, personalized, recomposable, and eventually actionable.
slides.visualPrompt: Wide cinematic background showing the difference between a flat recording and live structured software state. Semi-abstract layers of transparent data objects, nodes, state graphs, and recomposable interface planes unfolding in depth, with a faint dissolving pixel field in the background. Futuristic sci-fi but elegant and bright enough to feel premium, not heavy, not dense. Emerald, blue, amber, and red ember signal accents. Keep the left third quiet and dark for overlay copy, with no marks in that area. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols, no UI labels, no typography, no logos, no watermark, no people

slides.headline: Own discovery for generated software.
slides.line: Google found websites. Instagram surfaced photos. TikTok selected video. Katechon learns what software people want next.
slides.imageAlt: A cinematic software feed control plane connecting frontier model cores to live software channels and audience signals.
slides.narration: Every new media format made its biggest company at discovery. As users watch and use Katechon, we learn which models, prompts, tools, states, and intents become software channels. That graph is the new distribution layer.
slides.visualPrompt: Wide cinematic investor deck background, not an infographic. A colossal black-glass recommendation engine floats in deep space, routing luminous streams from frontier-model energy cores into thousands of live software-channel constellations. Abstract feed-era motifs appear only as unlabeled energy shapes: a red link mesh, a blue tile cloud, and amber vertical light columns. The whole scene feels like owning the algorithmic layer between models and users. Deep scale, crisp technical realism, premium dark environment, refined red ember, emerald signal, blue intelligence, amber opportunity accents. No captions, no typography, no readable UI, no logos, no people, no faces, 16:9 composition
